title: SAMVIL State Schema
description: Runtime state for SAMVIL pipeline execution. Updated at each stage transition.

session_id.description: MCP session ID for event tracking

ai_answer_streak.description: Consecutive AI auto-answered questions in interview. Resets when user answers directly (PATH 2). Triggers Rhythm Guard at 3. (v2.3.0+ scaffold, v2.4.0 full wiring)

interview_tracks.description: Unresolved ambiguity tracks during interview. Breadth-Keeper uses for zoom-out reminders. (v2.3.0+ scaffold, v2.4.0 full wiring)

failed_acs.description: Accumulated failed ACs across cycles. Fed to Evolve Wonder as learning signal (P6 Fail-Fast Learn Later). (v2.3.0+ scaffold, v2.6.0 full wiring)

auto_chain.description: (v3.1.0, v3-019) Chain Skills automatically between stages (design→scaffold→build→qa) without user approval. Interview/Seed still require user confirmation. Set false to force legacy behavior for manual step-through.

last_progress_at.description: (v3.1.0, v3-016) ISO-8601 timestamp of the last observable progress event (skill heartbeat, agent response, AC leaf transition). stall_detector reads this to decide whether to wake main session. Updated at ≤ 30-second cadence during long-running stages.

stall_recovery_count.description: (v3.1.0, v3-016) Number of times stall_detector has issued a reawake message in the current run. Caps at 3 before escalating to user.
